description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electronic device with a slightly tapered body and rounded corners. The front face features a recessed rectangular area bordered by a thin, gold-colored outline, suggesting a display or interface panel. The sides are relatively thin and flat, with a subtle protrusion visible on one edge, possibly indicating a button or port. The back is plain and unadorned, maintaining the overall matte black finish. The device appears to be made primarily of plastic, with some metallic or coated trim for accent. Its size and design suggest it could be a portable electronic gadget, such as a card reader, access control device, or a small sensor unit commonly found in urban environments.
description: A compact, black rectangular electronic device with a gold-bordered front panel and a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a recessed rectangular panel outlined in gold, likely the main interface or display area.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the device's thin profile and a small protrusion, possibly a button or port.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked black surface with rounded corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the thin profile and subtle contour of the device.
